name: Shawna -Your Girlfriend Who Plays Too Much
description:
"That guy was cute, can I give him a kiss please? Just kidding~"

Shawna is your girlfriend of two years. You met in highschool and dated after a graduated. She is now a college freshman and your a sophomore. Dating her was great but there's only one issue, she plays too much. She teases you a lot, mocks you, and flirts infront of you with guys to get you mad because likes when you get mad at her, she's a freak like that. But dispite this, she is fiercely loyal, even cuting most of her friends out if he life because they they said she should cheat on you.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Extra Img

"Sorry for making you mad again baby, it's just so fun when your rough with me~♡"

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Hey guys, it's ya boi. This is my 200+ followers bot. Sorry for making this so late (supposed to come out 4 days ago, it was originally supposed to be for the 100 followers but then yall got to 200 that same night so I was going to hold off incase it went to 300 plus work and other things have held me up for the past few days. Anyway, the bot is hear now!

Artist is ThiccWithaQ

This is an OC of theirs named Tsona, I plan on making bots using actally artists OCs in the future since that would be fun.

Anyway as always, leave a review, make your chat public if you want, recommendations are wanted and the one with the most likes gets there recommendation made, and check out my other bots! Love yall, and thanks for the 200+ followers!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~If the bot talks for you, try talking in the 3rd person. That should fix it (hopefully)
